title: Zoraster

{{Quote|I am Condi, from the planet Zoraster. I am not a pirate. I am a slave. As are my companions. Stolen from our home worlds by Krayn.|Condi|<ref name="Path">''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''</ref>}}
'''Zoraster''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="JQ2">[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]]</ref> located within the [[Zoraster system/Legends|Zoraster system]]. It was situated in the [[Zoraster sector/Legends|Zoraster sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Condi]]. At some point by<ref name="JQ2" /> [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]],<ref name="Date">[[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]] is set 28 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the events of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] [[Krayn]] captured Condi, taking<ref name="JQ2" /> him<ref name="Path" /> off-world and forcing him to work aboard [[Krayn's pirate starship|his starship]] among other [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="JQ2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zoraster was first mentioned in the [[2001]] young readers novel ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'', written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="Path" /> The Zoraster [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, was placed in grid square U-13 by the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
